staleness_gate_findings.summary: Digest reviewed 2026-04-10 through 2026-04-12. Last sections.json commit: 2026-04-12T22:46:39. Many digest findings predate this commit and have already been resolved.

stale_entries.resolution: Both issues already fixed: current text shows H≈1,498 km; TLDR uses {{TOTAL_WINS}} template. Review was of FUSE workspace stale copy.

holes: TLDR attributes spherical harmonics to dome model
stale_entries.resolution: Term 'spherical harmonic' not present in current section text. Already removed.
Current text uses '~38 km/yr' observed giving ~40% (consistent with dome's 39.9%). Test 6 'Dome Says' already shows 'PASS (39.9%)' as recommended.

holes: Part 1 cites table values as formula outputs
stale_entries.resolution: Current part1 correctly presents formula outputs (1.83, 2.84, 21.53) and notes table discrepancy (1.40, 3.49, 28.8) explicitly in parenthetical. Part 7 no longer has 28.8 error.
Current part6 has correct DOI 10.1109/8.898776. Already fixed.

critical_stale_entry.critical_hole: VERDICT-TEXT MISMATCH — verdict 'Self-Contradicted' but detail_verdict_text argued old case
critical_stale_entry.resolution: Already fixed in 22:46 commit. Current text leads with 'Self-Contradicted: The dome's own refraction formula n(r)...' correctly. Finding field also updated.

changes: Added dome verbatim rationale: 'Instrument noise floor prevents measurement. Prediction remains structurally valid. Hardware limitation, not model failure.'
Added parenthetical noting W001 results.json lacks noise_floor field (unlike W004)
Added direction_correct computation paradox: dome code evaluates direction_correct=false even when claiming measurement is below-noise and directionless
